name: TARGETPAIRS_BY_TARGET_PATHWAY
description: Target pairs by target pathway. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (t0:Target {symbol: $target})-[:IN_PATHWAY]->(pw:Pathway)<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair, pw.name AS pathway
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 50

examples: Which target-pair combinations fall under the pathway associated with TFR1?
Which target-pair combinations fall under the pathway associated with ALPG?
Which target-pair combinations fall under the pathway associated with BAFF?
